    subBlocks={[
        {
            "id": "operation",
            "type": "dropdown",
            "title": "Operación",
            "layout": "full",
            "options": [
                {
                    "label": "Generar Embeddings",
                    "id": "generate"
                },
                {
                    "label": "Insertar Texto",
                    "id": "upsert_text"
                },
                {
                    "label": "Buscar con Texto",
                    "id": "search_text"
                },
                {
                    "label": "Buscar con Vector",
                    "id": "search_vector"
                },
                {
                    "label": "Obtener Vectores",
                    "id": "fetch"
                }
            ],
            "defaultValue": "generate"
        },
        {
            "id": "apiKey",
            "type": "short-input",
            "title": "Clave API",
            "layout": "full",
            "placeholder": "Tu clave API de Pinecone",
            "password": true,
            "required": true
        },
        {
            "id": "model",
            "type": "dropdown",
            "title": "Modelo",
            "layout": "full",
            "options": [
                {
                    "label": "multilingual-e5-large",
                    "id": "multilingual-e5-large"
                },
                {
                    "label": "llama-text-embed-v2",
                    "id": "llama-text-embed-v2"
                },
                {
                    "label": "pinecone-sparse-english-v0",
                    "id": "pinecone-sparse-english-v0"
                }
            ]
        },
        {
            "id": "inputs",
            "type": "long-input",
            "title": "Entradas de Texto",
            "layout": "full",
            "placeholder": "[{\"text\": \"Tu texto aquí\"}]",
            "required": true
        }
    ]}
  />
</ShowcaseCard>

        }
    ]}

---

## Instrucciones de uso

Integra Pinecone en el flujo de trabajo. Puede generar embeddings, insertar texto, buscar con texto, recuperar vectores y buscar con vectores.

## Notas

- Categoría: `tools`
- Tipo: `pinecone`
